queries.question: What are the sources common to all reporters?
queries.sql: SELECT Sources.source_name  from Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources join Sources on Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources.source_id = Sources.source_id join Environment_And_Energy_Reporters on Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources.reporter_id = Environment_And_Energy_Reporters.id   GROUP BY Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources.source_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources.reporter_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Environment_And_Energy_Reporters)

queries.question: Show me the source every reporter has.
queries.sql: select environment_and_energy_reporters.name , sources.source_name from Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources join Sources on Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources.source_id = Sources.source_id join Environment_And_Energy_Reporters on Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources.reporter_id = Environment_And_Energy_Reporters.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?source_name WHERE {
  ?environment_and_energy_reporters_sources a :Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources .
  ?sources a :Sources .
  ?environment_and_energy_reporters_sources p:hasSources ?sources .
  ?environment_and_energy_reporters a :Environment_And_Energy_Reporters .
  ?environment_and_energy_reporters_sources p:hasEnvironment_And_Energy_Reporters ?environment_and_energy_reporters .
  ?environment_and_energy_reporters p:name ?name .
  ?sources p:source_name ?source_name .
}

queries.question: For each environment and energy reporter, what are the respective descriptions of their sources?
queries.sql: select environment_and_energy_reporters.name , sources.description from Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources join Sources on Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources.source_id = Sources.source_id join Environment_And_Energy_Reporters on Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources.reporter_id = Environment_And_Energy_Reporters.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?environment_and_energy_reporters_sources a :Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources .
  ?sources a :Sources .
  ?environment_and_energy_reporters_sources p:hasSources ?sources .
  ?environment_and_energy_reporters a :Environment_And_Energy_Reporters .
  ?environment_and_energy_reporters_sources p:hasEnvironment_And_Energy_Reporters ?environment_and_energy_reporters .
  ?environment_and_energy_reporters p:name ?name .
  ?sources p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: what descriptions are associated with each environment and energy reporter source?
queries.sql: SELECT Sources.description  from Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources join Sources on Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources.source_id = Sources.source_id join Environment_And_Energy_Reporters on Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources.reporter_id = Environment_And_Energy_Reporters.id   GROUP BY Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources.source_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources.reporter_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Environment_And_Energy_Reporters)

queries.question: List the source name and description for each environment and energy reporter.
queries.sql: select environment_and_energy_reporters.name , sources.source_name , sources.description from Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources join Sources on Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources.source_id = Sources.source_id join Environment_And_Energy_Reporters on Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources.reporter_id = Environment_And_Energy_Reporters.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?source_name ?description WHERE {
  ?environment_and_energy_reporters_sources a :Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources .
  ?sources a :Sources .
  ?environment_and_energy_reporters_sources p:hasSources ?sources .
  ?environment_and_energy_reporters a :Environment_And_Energy_Reporters .
  ?environment_and_energy_reporters_sources p:hasEnvironment_And_Energy_Reporters ?environment_and_energy_reporters .
  ?environment_and_energy_reporters p:name ?name .
  ?sources p:source_name ?source_name .
  ?sources p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: List the common source names and descriptions for all environment and energy reporters.
queries.sql: SELECT Sources.source_name, Sources.description  from Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources join Sources on Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources.source_id = Sources.source_id join Environment_And_Energy_Reporters on Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources.reporter_id = Environment_And_Energy_Reporters.id   GROUP BY Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources.source_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Environment_And_Energy_Reporters_Sources.reporter_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Environment_And_Energy_Reporters)

what descriptions are associated with each environment and energy reporter source?
List the source name and description connected to each reporter.
